'''âp-b-r-l''' ('''kapabreloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:homage|homage]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-b-r-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:homage|homage]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-b-r-l
|-
! Lemma
| kapabreloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipabreloko|thipabreloko]] || [[word:jipabreloko|jipabreloko]] || [[word:shipabreloko|shipabreloko]] || [[word:kipabreloko|kipabreloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupabreloko|thuthupabreloko]] || [[word:jujupabreloko|jujupabreloko]] || [[word:shushupabreloko|shushupabreloko]] || [[word:kukupabreloko|kukupabreloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupabreloko|thupabreloko]] || [[word:jupabreloko|jupabreloko]] || [[word:shupabreloko|shupabreloko]] || [[word:kupabreloko|kupabreloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupabreloko|thupabreloko]] || [[word:jupabreloko|jupabreloko]] || [[word:shupabreloko|shupabreloko]] || [[word:kupabreloko|kupabreloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepabreloko|thepabreloko]] || [[word:jepabreloko|jepabreloko]] || [[word:shepabreloko|shepabreloko]] || [[word:kepabreloko|kepabreloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopabreloko|thothopabreloko]] || [[word:jojopabreloko|jojopabreloko]] || [[word:shoshopabreloko|shoshopabreloko]] || [[word:kokopabreloko|kokopabreloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopabreloko|thopabreloko]] || [[word:jopabreloko|jopabreloko]] || [[word:shopabreloko|shopabreloko]] || [[word:kopabreloko|kopabreloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopabreloko|thopabreloko]] || [[word:jopabreloko|jopabreloko]] || [[word:shopabreloko|shopabreloko]] || [[word:kopabreloko|kopabreloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpabreloko|thĂŠpabreloko]] || [[word:jĂŠpabreloko|jĂŠpabreloko]] || [[word:shĂŠpabreloko|shĂŠpabreloko]] || [[word:kĂŠpabreloko|kĂŠpabreloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapabreloko|thathapabreloko]] || [[word:jajapabreloko|jajapabreloko]] || [[word:shashapabreloko|shashapabreloko]] || [[word:kakapabreloko|kakapabreloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapabreloko|thapabreloko]] || [[word:japabreloko|japabreloko]] || [[word:shapabreloko|shapabreloko]] || [[word:kapabreloko|kapabreloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapabreloko|thapabreloko]] || [[word:japabreloko|japabreloko]] || [[word:shapabreloko|shapabreloko]] || [[word:kapabreloko|kapabreloko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shapabrelithi|shapabrelithi]] || [[word:shapabreliji|shapabreliji]] || [[word:shapabrelishi|shapabrelishi]] || [[word:shapabreliki|shapabreliki]]
